sections.paragraph:
προσεάω (PLond V, 1790, 7 in Fgm. context [V–VI a.d. ‘permit as well’) permit to go farther τινά someone Ac 27:7.—M-M.

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 877
